ratings.comment: Dr. P is a great guy and his class is a blast! I learned a ton, and I really enjoyed doing lab work in a more relaxed environment where the focus is on exploring ideas and practicing skills. I highly recommend Tiny Earth to anyone who needs something to do for their IP project for Bio 152.
Dr. P is literally the best!! I could not recommend Tiny Earth enough.

One of the best professors I have had UW Madison! I also cannot recommend Tiny Earth enough! It was a very helpful class, and taught me to enjoy writing my IP project and conducting research. Dr. Pultorak cares about his students and was a very helpful resource. The class utilized a textbook, and grading was based on completion.

Josh teaches Tiny Earth and is kind. He cares about student interest in research and helps improve student laboratory skills throughout the semester. I wish he had spoke more about safety in the lab and was clearer with some expectations. Good communication tho. Overall, great experience and I highly suggest Tiny Earth to anyone who's interested!!
